title: The biological clock that doomed the Neanderthals - David Reich
summary: A YouTube discussion between Dwarkesh Patel and David Reich on the biological mechanisms that contributed to Neanderthal extinction. This is a paleogenomics and evolutionary biology topic, not an AI-industry item.
